name: Side Par - Golf Simulators and Sports Bar
about: Side Par is a golf simulator and sports bar venue that combines indoor golf with food and beverage offerings. The facility houses four top-tier golf simulators, providing access to over 150,000 courses, including real-world locations like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews. Pricing is based on an hourly rate per bay, varying by day and time, with a maximum of four people allowed per bay. The venue caters to both casual golfers looking for a social outing and serious players wanting to practice or play rounds.
why_golfers_like_it: Wide variety of over 150,000 golf courses available
Realistic putting experience with adjustable gimme distance
Top-tier simulator equipment for swing practice
Ability to bring your own clubs or rent them for a small fee
Social atmosphere combining golf with food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Curated food menu with items like pork tacos, burgers, fries, and grilled cheese. View full menu at provided link.
Full bar offering craft beer, cocktails, and other drinks.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but they must be clean and free of debris. Rental clubs are available for a $10 fee. Golf balls and tees are provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, offering a curated food menu and craft beer, cocktails. BYOB is not mentioned, so it's likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes about 1 hour per person to play 18 holes, depending on the course. With more experience, playtime can be reduced.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children can use the simulators, but they must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
